sentences.arabic: زَارَ الطَّالِبُ الْمَكْتَبَةَ الْعَامَّةَ لِيَبْحَثَ عَنْ كُتُبِ الْأَدَبِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Student je posjetio javnu biblioteku kako bi potražio stare knjige iz književnosti.
sentences.translationEn: The student visited the public library to look for old literature books.

sentences.arabic: وَجَدَ كُتُباً كَثِيرَةً لِعُلَمَاءَ وَأُدَبَاءَ مَشْهُورِينَ مِنَ الْمَاضِي.
sentences.translation: Pronašao je mnogo knjiga poznatih učenjaka i književnika iz prošlosti.
sentences.translationEn: He found many books by famous scholars and writers from the past.

sentences.arabic: قَرَأَ عَنْ تَارِيخِ النَّثْرِ وَتَطَوُّرِ الْقِصَّةِ الْقَصِيرَةِ.
sentences.translation: Čitao je o historiji proze i razvoju kratke priče.
sentences.translationEn: He read about the history of prose and the development of the short story.

sentences.arabic: كَانَتِ الصَّفَحَاتُ مَلِيئَةً بِالْحِكْمَةِ وَالْمَعْرِفَةِ الْقَيِّمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Stranice su bile pune mudrosti i vrijednog znanja.
sentences.translationEn: The pages were full of wisdom and valuable knowledge.

sentences.arabic: قَرَّرَ الطَّالِبُ أَنْ يَقْرَأَ كِتَاباً جَدِيداً كُلَّ أُسْبُوعٍ.
sentences.translation: Student je odlučio da svake sedmice pročita novu knjigu.
sentences.translationEn: The student decided to read a new book every week.
